title: Go to a social event where you know nobody and introduce yourself to 5 strangers
flavour: you spawned into a server with no friends. this is normal. load in.

title: Apologize to someone you've wronged — in person or by call, not text
flavour: the unsent apology is rotting in your inventory. deliver it.

title: Ask someone out — a date, a friendship, a collab. any ask that scares you
flavour: the worst outcome is a no. you already have a no. swing anyway.

title: Host something at your place — dinner, game night, movie — minimum 3 guests
flavour: you are the host. the party is at your location. deploy snacks.

title: Have a conversation with someone from a completely different background or viewpoint — genuinely listen
flavour: not to win. not to fix. to understand. that's the whole mission.

title: Volunteer for a cause or organization for half a day
flavour: show up. do the work. you won't regret it.

title: Tell someone in your life something honest you've been holding back
flavour: the unsaid thing takes up space. say it with care, but say it.

title: Spend a full day with a person you've been keeping at arm's length
flavour: let them in. fully. see what happens.

title: Join a recurring social group (class, club, team) and show up for the first session
flavour: you signed up. you're going. this is not a simulation.

title: Start a conversation with a stranger on public transit and let it go somewhere real
flavour: human beings are on this bus. you are one of them. act accordingly.
